title: Pan-Seared Golden Oysters
description: Delicious pan-seared oysters with a crunchy golden crust. A perfect appetizer or snack.

ingredients.name: 12 large oysters, shucked
ingredients.notes: Fresh oysters are a must for this dish

instructions: Preheat a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
Season the oysters with salt, pepper, and paprika.
Dredge the oysters in panko breadcrumbs, shaking off excess.
Add butter to the skillet and melt.
Add the oysters to the skillet, presentation side up.
Cook for 2-3 minutes or until golden brown.
Flip the oysters and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Remove the oysters from the skillet and serve immediately.
